preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stretchy_report WHERE report_name = 'Savings Accounts Transactions Report'

update.column: SELECT c.id AS "Client Id", CONCAT(c.firstname, ' ', COALESCE(c.middlename, ''), ' ', COALESCE(c.lastname, '')) AS "Client Name", sa.id AS "Saving Account Id", sa.account_no AS "Savings account no.", t.id AS "Transaction Id", to_char(COALESCE(t.submitted_on_date, t.created_date::date, t.transaction_date), 'DD Month YYYY') AS "Value Date", to_char(t.transaction_date, 'DD Month YYYY') AS "Transaction Date", sa.external_id AS "External Id", CASE t.transaction_type_enum WHEN 1 THEN 'Deposit' WHEN 2 THEN 'Withdrawal' WHEN 3 THEN 'Interest Posting' WHEN 4 THEN 'Withdrawal Fee' WHEN 5 THEN 'Annual Fee' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dividend Payout' WHEN 13 THEN 'Overdraft Interest' WHEN 21 THEN 'Withhold Tax' WHEN 23 THEN 'Charge Reversal' ELSE 'Other' END AS "Parent Transaction Type", CASE t.transaction_sub_type WHEN 1 THEN 'Disbursal' WHEN 2 THEN 'Refund' WHEN 3 THEN 'EMI Transfer' ELSE NULL END AS "Transaction Sub-Type", CASE WHEN t.transaction_sub_type IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT( CASE t.transaction_type_enum WHEN 1 THEN 'Deposit' WHEN 2 THEN 'Withdrawal' WHEN 3 THEN 'Interest Posting' WHEN 4 THEN 'Withdrawal Fee' WHEN 5 THEN 'Annual Fee' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dividend Payout' WHEN 13 THEN 'Overdraft Interest' WHEN 21 THEN 'Withhold Tax' WHEN 23 THEN 'Charge Reversal' ELSE 'Other' END, ' - ', CASE t.transaction_sub_type WHEN 1 THEN 'Disbursal' WHEN 2 THEN 'Refund' WHEN 3 THEN 'EMI Transfer' END ) ELSE CASE t.transaction_type_enum WHEN 1 THEN 'Deposit' WHEN 2 THEN 'Withdrawal' WHEN 3 THEN 'Interest Posting' WHEN 4 THEN 'Withdrawal Fee' WHEN 5 THEN 'Annual Fee' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dividend Payout' WHEN 13 THEN 'Overdraft Interest' WHEN 21 THEN 'Withhold Tax' WHEN 23 THEN 'Charge Reversal' ELSE 'Other' END END AS "Transaction Type", CASE WHEN t.transaction_type_enum IN (2, 4, 5, 13, 21) THEN t.amount ELSE NULL END AS "Debit", CASE WHEN t.transaction_type_enum IN (1, 3, 12, 23) THEN t.amount ELSE NULL END AS "Credit", t.running_balance_derived AS "Balance", pt.value AS "Payment Type" FROM m_savings_account_transaction t JOIN m_savings_account sa ON sa.id = t.savings_account_id JOIN m_client c ON c.id = sa.client_id LEFT JOIN m_payment_detail pd ON pd.id = t.payment_detail_id LEFT JOIN m_payment_type pt ON pt.id = pd.payment_type_id WHERE t.is_reversed = FALSE AND (${clientId} = -1 OR c.id = ${clientId}) AND (${savingsId} = -1 OR sa.id = ${savingsId}) AND pt.value IS NOT NULL AND pd.payment_type_id <> 5 ORDER BY c.id ASC, sa.id ASC, t.transaction_date DESC, t.id DESC
